heading: Transcript of trial records
label: 5704 Transcript of trial records
text: The Secretary may purchase transcripts of the record, including all evidence, of trial of litigated cases.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 3304 of this titlesubstituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83
